description: vLLM inference monitoring: throughput, latency, cache, model performance

panels.description: Estimated FLOPS/s per GPU. Requires vLLM to be started with the --enable-mfu-metrics flag. Without that flag the counter stays at 0.
panels.title: FLOPS per GPU

panels.description: Estimated memory read bandwidth per GPU. Requires vLLM to be started with the --enable-mfu-metrics flag. Without that flag the counter stays at 0.
panels.title: Memory Read Bandwidth

panels.description: Estimated memory write bandwidth per GPU. Requires vLLM to be started with the --enable-mfu-metrics flag. Without that flag the counter stays at 0.
panels.title: Memory Write Bandwidth

title: vLLM Inference
